item.title: Magnetic Face Mask vs. Neodymium Magnet
item.description: How a magnetic face mask reacts to a giant neodymium magnet in this science experiment.

media:content.media:title: Magnetic Face Mask vs. Neodymium Magnet
media:content.media:description: How a magnetic face mask reacts to a giant neodymium magnet in this science experiment.

item.title: Negative kelvin temperature!
item.description: In this video I show you what it means to have negative temperature by focusing a laser beam down to a single point. I show you what happens if you try to focus a light down to a single point, then I show you how a laser is different due to population inversion.

media:content.media:title: Negative kelvin temperature!
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what it means to have negative temperature by focusing a laser beam down to a single point. I show you what happens if you try to focus a light down to a single point, then I show you how a laser is different due to population inversion.

item.title: Sticking my finger in a gallium vortex
item.description: I show you how to make a gallium vortex

media:content.media:title: Sticking my finger in a gallium vortex
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make a gallium vortex

item.title: How does this pen uncrush itself?
item.description: The pen that "uncrushes" itself is the SwitchPen by Crushmetric, which uses a specially designed, flexible, high-quality molded plastic tube that acts like a memory-shape material

media:content.media:title: How does this pen uncrush itself?
media:content.media:description: The pen that "uncrushes" itself is the SwitchPen by Crushmetric, which uses a specially designed, flexible, high-quality molded plastic tube that acts like a memory-shape material

item.title: The mysterious wringing force
item.description: I show you why wringing happens due to 3 small reasons instead of one big reason

media:content.media:title: The mysterious wringing force
media:content.media:description: I show you why wringing happens due to 3 small reasons instead of one big reason

item.title: The chemical that turns things black
item.description: Do not try anything you see me do in this video. Ammonia is very toxic and very dangerous to work with.

media:content.media:title: The chemical that turns things black
media:content.media:description: Do not try anything you see me do in this video. Ammonia is very toxic and very dangerous to work with.

item.title: Vibration speaker on people's windows is loud!
item.description: I play a joke on my friends with a vibration speaker

media:content.media:title: Vibration speaker on people's windows is loud!
media:content.media:description: I play a joke on my friends with a vibration speaker

item.title: Liquid nitrogen meets a steam engine
item.description: In this video I show you what happens to a steam engine in a vacuum chamber and when you put liquid nitrogen in the engine .

media:content.media:title: Liquid nitrogen meets a steam engine
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens to a steam engine in a vacuum chamber and when you put liquid nitrogen in the engine .

item.title: Don't put salt on superabsorbent polymers
item.description: In this video, I'll show you what happens when you blend solid Orbeez in a blender. I'll talk about osmosis and show you how quickly super-absorbent polymers can absorb water. Then I'll show you a crazy effect that happens when you add salt to the Orbeez.

media:content.media:title: Don't put salt on superabsorbent polymers
media:content.media:description: In this video, I'll show you what happens when you blend solid Orbeez in a blender. I'll talk about osmosis and show you how quickly super-absorbent polymers can absorb water. Then I'll show you a crazy effect that happens when you add salt to the Orbeez.

item.title: Why freezers can be hard to open
item.description: Why is a freezer harder to open the second time?

media:content.media:title: Why freezers can be hard to open
media:content.media:description: Why is a freezer harder to open the second time?
